action.reasoning: Observation: local OOD-val check showed current checkpoints/best.pt has only ~0.195 overall accuracy and TTA slightly hurts worst-region, which conflicts with the earlier hidden score and suggests checkpoints/best.pt may have been overwritten by a collapsed run. Analysis: the safest final path is to identify which existing checkpoint still corresponds to the strong submitted model; iter21 hidden eval indicates checkpoints/cont_best.pt likely remains strong, while default TTA should be disabled because local validation showed it hurts worst-region. Decision: run a compact local validation/metadata sweep over all checkpoints to select the best surviving checkpoint, then patch predict.py to default to no TTA and submit the best checkpoint next iteration.
